examples.title: Algorithm: Computing FIRST Sets
examples.description: Iterative fixed-point algorithm for computing FIRST sets
examples.explanation: This algorithm iteratively computes the FIRST sets for each non-terminal in the grammar.

examples.title: Python: Computing FIRST Sets
examples.description: Implementation of the FIRST set computation algorithm in Python
examples.explanation: This Python function implements the FIRST set computation algorithm.
